/* Manually defined undefined symbols (not overwritten by splat) */
/* func_89C9BDC8: misinterpreted data at start of text section */
func_89C9BDC8 = 0x89C9BDC8;
/* Mid-function labels referenced as data pointers by C code */
D_8001167C = 0x8001167C;
D_8001AD60 = 0x8001AD60;
D_80035F70 = 0x80035F70;
/* Data symbols renamed from auto-generated names (splat regenerates as D_XXXXXXXX) */
g_fileTableDesc = 0x80051694;
/* CC1PSX inserts jal __main for functions named main(); use alias to avoid.
   When ff8main is decomped to C, uncomment to alias: main = ff8main; */
/* PsyQ BIOS functions referenced by libetc/pad and libsnd */
EnterCriticalSection = 0x800472E4;
ExitCriticalSection = 0x800472F4;
